name: Blast diffusion boots
hoverSummary: Tier 80 magic boots with 12.5 magic damage bonus and Wild Magic synergy.
detailLines: Using Wild Magic applies Blast Infused for 10 ticks.
Blast Infused causes basic magic abilities to gain +8% base damage.
implementationNotes: Curated magic boots from the live Blast diffusion boots page. Wiki-verified with Playwright for tier, style bonus, and Inner Wrath passive text.
